title: Asking for Directions 问路
scene: 游客在街上迷路了，向路人问路。

lines.en: Excuse me, can you help me? I'm looking for the train station.
lines.zh: 打扰一下，您能帮我吗？我在找火车站。

lines.en: Sure! Walk straight ahead for two blocks.
lines.zh: 当然！往前直走两个街区。

lines.en: Two blocks? And then which way?
lines.zh: 两个街区？然后往哪边走？

lines.en: Then turn left at the traffic light. You'll see it on your right.
lines.zh: 然后在红绿灯处左转。你会在右边看到它。

lines.en: Is it far from here? Can I walk there?
lines.zh: 离这里远吗？我能走过去吗？

lines.en: It's about a fifteen-minute walk. Not too far.
lines.zh: 大约走十五分钟。不算远。

lines.en: Are there any landmarks I should look for?
lines.zh: 有什么标志性的建筑我应该注意的吗？

lines.en: Yes, you'll pass a big park on your left. The station is right after it.
lines.zh: 有的，你会经过左边一个大公园。火车站就在公园后面。

lines.en: That's very clear. Thank you so much for your help!
lines.zh: 非常清楚了。非常感谢你的帮助！

lines.en: You're welcome! Have a good trip!
